productDisplayName: Indigo Nation Men Grey Check Trousers
description: Style NoteThis pair of trousers from indigo nation is that contour-friendly pair you have been looking for. Designed for off-duty wear and crafted from quality cotton fabric, this piece makes for a perfect addition to your wardrobe. Wear it on a casual day out or when roughing it out in the great outdoors. Team it with funky T-shirts and casual shoes.Product DetailsCharcoal grey trousers with a looped waistband, button and zipper closure, two side pockets, two buttoned flap pockets on the thigh and two back pockets with buttoned flapsMaterial and Care100% cottonHand/machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wringDrip dry in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
